_publications._publicationTitle: PET imaging for attention deficit preclinical drug testing in neurofibromatosis-1 mice.

_contextSnippet: Our previous experiments using Nf1 CKO mice revealed a 10% reduction in the number of Nf1 +/− tyrosine hydroxylase (TH)-positive neurons innervating the striatum in vivo
details: 10% reduction in number of tyrosine hydroxylase (TH)-positive neurons innervating the striatum in vivo
